query: SELECT id, name, code, atollId, latitude, longitude, description FROM places WHERE type = 'airport' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, code, atollId, latitude, longitude, description FROM places WHERE type = 'airport' ORDER BY name;
